compilerOptions.//declaration: Apps don't ship .d.ts files, and pnpm's nested .pnpm/ layout breaks the 'portable name' check for inferred Express Router types. Override the base tsconfig and skip declaration emit.

//comment: Test files are checked + run by vitest, not by tsc. tsc with noUncheckedIndexedAccess is too strict for arrange-act-assert tests where we know an array has N elements.
